# Basic Subtraction

Basic subtraction operator

```perl
$result = $a - $b;
```

# Expected Compilation Outcomes

## Basic Subtraction

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$result = $a - $b;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$result = $a - $b;
```
